top_signals.title: CIBC to Offer SpaceX Access Through Depositary Receipt
top_signals.summary: Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce is set to offer Canadians access to SpaceX through a vehicle that gives local investors access to global stocks.

top_signals.title: Why Starritt Wrote 'Drayton and Mackenzie'
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg Weekend executive editor Katherine Bell talks to interview author Alexander Starritt on “Drayton and Mackenzie,” a 2025 Bloomberg Book of the Year. They speak in London at a Bloomberg.com subscriber-only event. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Former Lower House speaker Yohei Kono dies at 89
top_signals.summary: Kono was a leading dove within the ruling Liberal Democratic Party and championed stable ties with neighbors of Japan, including China and South Korea.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CISA to transform how it assesses cyber vulnerabilities and risks, Andersen says
top_signals.summary: A binding operational directive being released Wednesday will direct federal agencies to change the way they address vulnerabilities by elevating some while putting others to the side.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
